description: Clinically proven to plump lips by up to 40% in 4 weeks*, our viral, award-winning Tripeptide Plumping Lip Balm is back in a new, buildable and universally flattering berry lip tint to power up your plump. Specially formulated to hydrate, repair and plump lips, the tinted balm works over time to visibly increase lip volume leaving lips looking naturally fuller and healthier without any tingle or irritation. So now your lips not only look plumper but, ARE plumper. No filter, no filler, just fuller – and now in color. ​ ​ Formulated with 6% Tripeptide Complex, to visibly increase lip volume over time for plumper-looking, more defined lips, together with 6% Ultra Filling Spheres which deliver Hyaluronic Acid to the lip to plump, retain moisture and help to fill fine lines, Tripeptide Lip Balm enhances fullness, defines lip contours, and reduces the appearance of fine lines and creasing around the mouth. With continued use, the proof really is in the plump. For best results we recommend using at least 3-times per day. ​ ​ Unlike some traditional cosmetic lip plumpers, this multi-tasking lip plumper works to maintain the skin barrier and retain moisture to improve and protect overall lip health whilst visibly enhancing lip volume. An ideal non-sticky alternative to lip gloss, the tinted lip plumping balm leaves a sheer warm red berry hue on the lips which can be easily layered to increase the vibrancy of the color. ​ ​ Suitable for everyone, especially those who love to wear lip color and want to improve fullness and/or dry, cracked and damaged lips. ​ Delivered by science, not irritation, it's your lips, but fuller now in color.

description: Super luxurious and super plush, SuperSuede Baked Powder Blush is the new standard for baked powder blush. Hand-whipped and baked using time-honored Italian techniques, SuperSuede has a velvety texture that melts into skin for an impossibly lightweight, diffused flush of color with a natural-blurred finish. With a curated palette of six shades, SuperSuede Blush gives effortless, breathable color payoff, and works for a wide range of looks. SuperSuede is also non-comedogenic, long-wearing, and never patchy, cakey, or drying. Pair with NEW: The Powder Blush Brush , intentionally designed for SuperSuede for precise, seamless application. We recommend keeping SuperSuede out of direct lighting, both natural and artificial, when not in use. Since this formula contains some light-sensitive pigments, excess light may affect the top layer. Simply dust off the top layer to return to normal.

description: Smell like you just stepped out of the shower when you swipe on our invigorating Cape Town scent. Like skincare, consistency is key. Wearing antiperspirant? Layer DEODORANT on top for an extra hit of fragrance + freshness.

description: WHAT YOU GET: A high-performance, daily anti-blemish serum that targets all 3 stages of breakouts in one step . description: Introducing Milk Cleanser, for a gentle yet effective cleanse that leaves skin hydrated and balanced without a hint of tightness. Non-irritating, non-stripping, non-drying. Suitable for even the most sensitive of skin. *24 HOUR HYDRATION, CLINICALLY PROVEN. Unlock hydrated skin with this gentle cream-to-milk cleanser. Packed with the soothing benefits of Rice Milk and the intensely hydrating power of Hyaluronic Acid, this advanced formula deeply cleanses while delivering long-lasting hydration. It removes makeup, impurities, and pollution without stripping the skin or leaving it feeling tight, providing a balanced cleanse that supports your skin’s natural barrier. Hydrating Cream to Milk Cleanser combines the best of both worlds: powerful cleansing with gentle hydration. The lightweight, creamy texture transforms into a nourishing milk upon contact with water, effortlessly removing even the most stubborn makeup and impurities while leaving the skin feeling soft and nourished. Rice Milk – known for its soothing and barrier- supporting properties – works alongside Hyaluronic Acid to keep skin plump and hydrated for up to 24 hours. Your skin feels refreshed, balanced and comfortable all day long. Suitable for both AM and PM use, this cleanser is the first step of your skincare routine. Say goodbye to dryness or that tight, uncomfortable feeling, and say hello to cleansed, hydrated skin. *Tested on 34 participants over 1 week

description: Resurface, rejuvenate, and hydrate your skin with Exosome Hydro-Glow Complex. Powered by 3-million plant-derived Exosomes, this powerhouse collagen- boosting serum delivers clinic-worthy results without the price tag. Clinically proven to visibly boost glow, smooth and renew skin in 14 days*, it gives you that just had a facial glow, no appointment necessary. ​ Formulated with technology once exclusively reserved for medi -clinics, this glow serum brings the results of a professional facial direct to your daily skincare routine. At 300x smaller than a skin pore, hero ingredient Cica Exosomes carry actives directly to the skin cells for maximum effectiveness, helping to boost collagen production by 300%, reduce inflammation by 55% and improve skin repair by 63% in 8 hours**. ​ In addition, Prickly Pear Extract offers gentle resurfacing, Kollaren helps to boost skin firmness and a blend of Hyaluronic Acid and Ectoin helps to support the skin’s barrier with up to 12 hours of hydration**, creating a true multifunctional facial glow serum that delivers advanced results. ​ The creamy, lightweight texture effortlessly sinks into the skin without tackiness and layers perfectly under other skincare and makeup. Suitable for use as part of the AM and PM routine. ​ *4-week clinical study of 26 people / **Clinical study of 31 people / ***In-Vitro tests show that Cica Exosomes increase the genes related to collagen production by approximately 300%, decreases inflammation by 55% and increase skin repair and renal by 63%.

description: The same beachy texture you know & love, but with a better feel. This salt-free Wave Spray enhances your hair’s natural texture, adds body & volume BUT—and this is the important part—still keeps your strands feeling soft & hydrated. Get that “just got out of the ocean” look, minus the ocean. HOW TO USE Straight Hair - Wet to Dry- Heatless/Heat Shake WAVE SPRAY. Spray on clean, wet hair from 6–8 inches away, roots to ends. Scrunch, squeeze, or twist to create texture. Air dry for soft, tousled texture and bend. Pro Tip: For defined texture, twist or braid damp hair, secure ends, and let air dry. Diffuse for added volume and bend. Pro Tip: Blow-dry in sections with a round brush for a textured, voluminous finish. Straight Hair - Dry Style, Heat Start with dry, tangle-free hair. Apply heat protection. Section hair based on desired wave size. Smaller sections = tighter waves. Larger sections = loose waves. Use a curling iron, waver, or flat iron, alternating sections for a natural beachy look. Shake WAVE SPRAY and apply from roots to ends. Scrunch to enhance texture. Pro Tip: Finger rake curls with WAVE SPRAY on your hands for a softer, more lived-in finish. Wavy Hair - Wet to Dry - Heatless/Heat Start with clean, wet hair. Apply 1–2 pumps of AIR DRY FOAM. Scrunch or twist in. Shake WAVE SPRAY and spray evenly (6–8 inches away). Scrunch until waves form. Add more WAVE SPRAY if needed. Tip: Twist or braid while wet, secure ends, and air dry for defined waves. Use a diffuser for extra texture, volume, and bend. Wavy Hair - Dry Style -Heat Detangle hair and apply heat protection. Use a curling or flat iron, alternating section sizes for a natural look. Shake WAVE SPRAY, spray 6 to 8 inches away, scrunch and squeeze in. Curly Hair - Wet to Dry - Heatless/Heat Follow your curl routine. Try CURL CRÉME. Shake WAVE SPRAY and spray 6–8 inches away from your hair. Scrunch curls into shape. Use a diffuser, flipping hair upside down for more volume. ProTip - Spray WAVE SPRAY just at the roots for added texture and fullness.
